positive: A whimsical, highly stylized forest scene illustration. Central composition features a majestic, glowing moon casting soft shadows on oversized, bioluminescent flora and fauna. Include a graceful, stylized deer silhouette standing among ancient, swirling roots and oversized fantasy mushrooms. The style should be a combination of intricate linework woodcut engraving and vibrant modern watercolor washes, giving it a deep, enchanted mood. Strong contrast between the dark, moody silhouettes and the glowing neon accents of the forest elements. Color palette: Deep jewel tones (sapphire, emerald, amethyst) accented by luminous pale blue and gold. Suitable for a symmetrical, central apparel print.
negative: blur, text, watermark, signature, low resolution, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, artifacts, blurry edges, logo, trap, copyright, celebrity, modern photorealism
